title: Gear Aid Revivex Odor Eliminator for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 1 Gallon
description:
Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the odor causing smells. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

Gear Aid Revivex Odor Eliminator for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 1 Gallon

Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the odor causing smells.

Key Features

  • Size: 1 Gallon
  • Eliminate odor causing smells from all types of odors including pets, water, waste and perspiration with this powerful, all-natural formula (previously Mirazyme)
  • Use the concentrated formula with water-activated enzymes that penetrate fabric pores to remove odor; treat multiple garments with just half an ounce in 20 gallons of water
  • Soak outerwear, tents, athletic clothes, shoes, and pet gear with this gentle solution; also effective on neoprene, nylon, polyester, and GORE-TEX fabrics
  • Spray or soak for hard to wash gear; compatible with washing machines and available in 2 fl oz and 10 fl oz, and 1 gallon

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 36119-1G
  • UPC: 021563361193
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 1 gal

Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra and cotton.

Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.
